source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/07_(CYAN) GT1717C, GT1717CP/91_인증 - 국내/참고 - 성능시험성적서 첨부자료 G series/1. [G series] 성능시험성적서 (A-PTR-(R)BLU).pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Performance Test Report A-PTR-(R)BLU Rev. 2 for H&abyz HnX-R1 G series digital flat panel X-ray detector performance verification.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports domestic regulatory or technical file evidence for G series detector performance settings and test results.
keyPoints: The report identifies manufacturer H&abyz Co., Ltd., product name 의료영상획득장치 Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector, model name HnX-R1, and console software HnVUE.
Revision history lists Rev. 2 issued 2025.11.19, revised due to addition of limited resolution test content.

Test items include CsI deposition thickness, sensor type, scintillator, pixel pitch, effective pixel number, effective pixel area, sensitivity, MTF, DQE, limited resolution, energy range, A/D conversion, wireless standard, IP range, communication, and trigger mode.
The conclusion states that the performance setting values of 의료영상획득장치 (model HnX-R1, G series) were confirmed to have no abnormality.

entities.name: IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac

evidence.claim: The document is Performance Test Report A-PTR-(R)BLU, Rev. No. 2, issued 2025.11.19.
evidence.evidenceText: 성능시험성적서 (Performance Test Report) Doc No. A-PTR-(R)BLU Rev. No. 2 Issue date 2025.11.19

evidence.claim: The report covers H&abyz Co., Ltd. 의료영상획득장치 Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector model HnX-R1.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacturer H&abyz Co., Ltd. Product name 의료영상획득장치 Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector Model Name HnX-R1

evidence.claim: The report is for confirming G series detector performance of HnX-R1.
evidence.evidenceText: 본 시험 성적서는 의료영상획득장치 (HnX-R1)의 G series 디텍터 성능 확인을 위한 시험성적서이다.

evidence.claim: The G series reference models listed are G1417CW, G1417CWP, G1417FW, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717CWP, G1717FW, and G1717FWP.
evidence.evidenceText: (G series) G1417CW, G1417CWP, G1417FW, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717CWP, G1717FW, G1717FWP

evidence.claim: The report also lists 2/3G series references A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: (2/3G series) A1717MCW, A1417MCW, F1417MCW

evidence.claim: The tested G series serial numbers are listed for G1417CW, G1417CWP, G1417FW, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717CWP, G1717FW, and G1717FWP.
The test period was 2025.11.14 to 2025.11.17 at H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Yongin, Gyeonggi-do.
evidence.evidenceText: 시험일시: 2025.11.14~2025.11.17 시험장소: ㈜에이치앤아비즈 (경기도 용인시 처인구 처인성로41-16 2동 (우) 17118)
evidence.pageTarget: HnX-R1 G Series Performance Test Conditions

evidence.claim: CsI deposition thickness testing passed for 300 μm type and 500 μm type panels.
evidence.evidenceText: 300μm type : 338.41μm 기준치 만족 2) 500μm type : 507.54μm 기준치 만족

evidence.claim: Sensor type testing passed with PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO) and Flexible PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO) criteria.
evidence.evidenceText: Sensor Type (센서 타입 확인) PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO) 사양서 확인 PASS Flexible PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO) PASS

evidence.claim: Scintillator verification passed using CsI specification confirmation.
evidence.evidenceText: Scintillator 확인 CsI 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Pixel pitch criterion was 140 μm ± 10%, and the test result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Pixel pitch 140μm ± 10% 확인된 Pixel area를 Pixel number로 나눠 기준값 이내인지 확인. PASS

evidence.claim: Effective pixel number criteria passed for 2500 x 3052 pixels, 3040 x 3040 pixels, and 3072 x 3072 pixels model groups.
evidence.evidenceText: Effective Pixel Number 확인 2500 x 3052 pixels 이상 PASS G1717CW G1717CWP 3040 x 3040 pixels 이상 PASS G1717FW G1717FWP 3072 x 3072 pixels 이상 PASS

evidence.claim: Effective pixel area criteria passed for 350 x 427.3 mm, 425.6 x 425.6 mm, and 430.1 x 430.1 mm model groups.
evidence.evidenceText: Effective Pixel Area 확인 350 x 427.3mm ± 10% 이내 PASS G1717CW G1717CWP 425.6 x 425.6mm ± 10% 이내 G1717FW G1717FWP 430.1 x 430.1mm ± 10% 이내

evidence.claim: Sensitivity testing passed for all listed G series models.
evidence.evidenceText: G1417CW 172 LSB/uGy PASS G1417FW 168 LSB/uGy PASS G1717CW 165 LSB/uGy PASS G1717FW 162 LSB/uGy PASS G1417CWP 174 LSB/uGy PASS G1417FWP 170 LSB/uGy PASS G1717CWP 158 LSB/uGy PASS G1717FWP 160 LSB/uGy PASS

evidence.claim: MTF testing passed for all listed G series models.
evidence.evidenceText: G1417CW 0.5lp/mm 83%이상 87% PASS ... G1717FWP 0.5lp/mm 83%이상 83% PASS 1.0lp/mm 62%이상 66% 2.0lp/mm 30%이상 36% 3.0lp/mm 11%이상 14%

evidence.claim: DQE testing passed for all listed G series models.
evidence.evidenceText: G1417CW 0.1lp/mm 60%이상 64% PASS ... G1717FWP 0.1lp/mm 70%이상 72% PASS 0.5lp/mm 62%이상 66% 1.0lp/mm 53%이상 57% 2.0lp/mm 38%이상 45% 3.0lp/mm 19%이상 27%

evidence.claim: Limited resolution criterion was Max 3.57 lp/mm and the measured calculation was 1 / 140um * 2 = 3.57 lp/mm, with PASS result.
evidence.evidenceText: Limited resolution Max 3.57 lp/mm 1 / Pixel pitch * 2 PASS * 시험 결과 기준 값 측정값 결과 Max 3.57 lp/mm 1 / 140um * 2 = 3.57 lp/mm PASS

evidence.claim: Energy range testing passed for 40 kVp and 150 kVp operation for all listed G series models.
evidence.evidenceText: Energy range 40kvp, 150kvp 정상동작 40kvp / 150kvp로 조사 시 영상 획득되는지 확인. PASS

evidence.claim: A/D conversion testing passed for 14-bit and 16-bit handling.
evidence.evidenceText: A/D Conversion 14, 16bits ROIC 보드의 A/D 변환 해상도는 16bit이며, 하위 2비트를 제거하여 14bit로 변환하여 사용하는 방식임.

evidence.claim: Wireless standard verification passed against IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac by Wifi module specification confirmation.
evidence.evidenceText: Wireless standard IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac Wifi 모듈 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: IP range criterion was IP68 according to IEC 60529, and the test result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IP Range IP68 IEC 60529에 따른다 PASS

evidence.claim: Communication criterion was 1Giga-bit Ethernet, and the result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Communication 1Giga-bit Ethernet 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Trigger mode testing passed for line trigger mode and auto trigger mode.
evidence.evidenceText: Trigger mode Line trigger 모드 정상동작 PASS Auto trigger 모드 정상동작 PASS

evidence.claim: The conclusion states that no abnormality was confirmed in the performance setting values of HnX-R1 G series.
evidence.evidenceText: 해당 시험 결과를 통해 의료영상획득장치 (모델명: HnX-R1, G series)의 성능 설정 값에 이상 없음을 확인하였다.
evidence.pageTarget: HnX-R1 G Series Performance Test Conclusion

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is ambiguous: source metadata indicates MFDS/domestic, but the source text does not name MFDS or an issuing authority for the report.

Several attachment pages are represented only by headings or blank extracted text, so supporting attachment details such as a-Si, IGZO, CsI, WiFi module, IP68 reports, IMX8 datasheet, and KGMP certificate are not fully extractable from the provided text.
OCR/text quality issues are present in some terms, including 'Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector' and 'IMX8 DATASHHET'; values were preserved as shown in the source.
